meta.content: Terms of use for the Tally Custom Report Builder desktop application.
meta.name: description

head.title: Tally Custom Report Builder Terms | Samriddhi Associates

div.h1: Tally Custom Report Builder Terms of Use
div.p: Authorised use, report verification and software licensing terms.
By using the application, the user agrees to these terms.
The user may access and report only Tally data that the user owns or is authorised to handle.

The software assists with extracting and arranging selected data but does not certify the completeness, accounting treatment or legal accuracy of a report. The user must verify the active company, period, filters, columns and totals.
The software licence is issued for the approved user, organisation, device or installation. The user must not redistribute, reverse engineer, bypass licensing or provide unauthorised access.
Operation depends on the supported Tally version, local configuration, available fields, permissions and connectivity. Features may change as those dependencies change.

Samriddhi Associates is not responsible for incorrect, incomplete or duplicated report results caused by source-data errors, wrong filters, unsupported fields, Tally configuration or failure to review the exported report.
Practical software tools for GST professionals, businesses and authorised users.

Contact:

Cell : +91-98299-27177
